productDisplayName: Highlander Men White Casual Checked Slim Fit Shirt
description: CompositionHalf sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, with white, red and black plaid checks, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest with thread detailing, full length buttoned placket with red buttons with scraped look, brand name appliqued on the bottom of the facing placket and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  white, red and black  plaid check shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
